reference: My six-year-old has obvious seasonal allergies and experiences severe cases of hay fever. I have also noticed she shows some symptoms of food allergies, but I haven't narrowed them down to specifics. At night, she complains of vaginal burning, but only during the hay fever episodes. Could this be a reaction to food?
text: My six-year-old has obvious seasonal allergies and experiences severe cases of hay fever. I have also noticed she shows some symptoms of food allergies, but I haven't narrowed them down to specifics. Etty complains of vaginal burning, but only during the hay fever episodes. Could this be a reaction to food?
